summary: Imported the supplied ChatGPT export into DinoBrain with complete message-hash coverage, 842 local-only searchable source cards, privacy-safe Wiki registry and reviewed knowledge profile, rebuilt indexes, verified retrieval, and pushed scoped app/data commits.
decisions: Keep raw transcripts, assistant content, account identifiers, and attachment binaries out of public Git.
Register every message with metadata and redacted-content SHA-256, while retaining bounded redacted user excerpts only in Git-ignored local source cards.
Use trace_only because knowledge growth was performed explicitly by the reviewed importer.
next_steps: Optionally add encrypted private backup for local source cards.
search_queries: ChatGPT session plan before execution direct evidence knowledge compounding
